prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances ‚ÄĒ either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small purple rubber sphere
  - obj_1: large gray metal cube
  - obj_2: small green metal cube
  - obj_3: large brown metal cylinder
  - obj_4: small red metal cube
  - obj_5: large brown metal cube
  - obj_6: small brown metal sphere
  - obj_7: large cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_8: large cyan rubber cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0221] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0222] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0223] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0224] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0225] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0226] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0227] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0228] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0229] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0230] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0231] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0232] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0233] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0234] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0235] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0236] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0237] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0238] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0239] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0240] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in the scene to answer distance comparison questions.

Let me estimate the positions of each object based on the image:
- obj_0 (small purple rubber sphere): center-ish, middle depth
- obj_1 (large gray metal cube): left side, front area
- obj_2 (small green metal cube): center-front area
- obj_3 (large brown metal cylinder): right side, front area
- obj_4 (small red metal cube): left-back area
- obj_5 (large brown metal cube): center-front, close to viewer
- obj_6 (small brown metal sphere): center-back area
- obj_7 (large cyan rubber sphere): right-center, front area
- obj_8 (large cyan rubber cylinder): right-back area

Let me estimate coordinates (x, y, z) roughly:
- obj_0 (purple sphere): (0, 0, 0) - using as reference
- obj_1 (gray cube): (-3, 0, 1)
- obj_2 (green cube): (1, -0.5, 2)
- obj_3 (brown cylinder): (3.5, 0, 1)
- obj_4 (red cube): (-2, 0.5, -2)
- obj_5 (brown cube): (0.5, -0.5, 3.5)
- obj_6 (brown sphere): (0, 0.5, -1)
- obj_7 (cyan sphere): (2.5, -0.5, 1)
- obj_8 (cyan cylinder): (2, 0.5, -2)

Now calculating distances for each question:

dist(obj_1, obj_6) ‚Čą dist((-3,0,1), (0,0.5,-1)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(9+0.25+4) ‚Čą ‚ąö13.25 ‚Čą 3.6

[qrr_0221] dist(obj_2, obj_5) ‚Čą dist((1,-0.5,2), (0.5,-0.5,3.5)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(0.25+0+2.25) ‚Čą 1.6 ‚Üí obj_1-obj_6 > obj_2-obj_5: ">"
[qrr_0222] dist(obj_2, obj_7) ‚Čą dist((1,-0.5,2), (2.5,-0.5,1)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(2.25+0+1) ‚Čą 1.8 ‚Üí ">"
[qrr_0223] dist(obj_2, obj_8) ‚Čą dist((1,-0.5,2), (2,0.5,-2)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(1+1+16) ‚Čą 4.2 ‚Üí "<"
[qrr_0224] dist(obj_3, obj_4) ‚Čą dist((3.5,0,1), (-2,0.5,-2)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(30.25+0.25+9) ‚Čą 6.3 ‚Üí "<"
[qrr_0225] dist(obj_3, obj_5) ‚Čą dist((3.5,0,1), (0.5,-0.5,3.5)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(9+0.25+6.25) ‚Čą 3.9 ‚Üí "~="
[qrr_0226] dist(obj_3, obj_7) ‚Čą dist((3.5,0,1), (2.5,-0.5,1)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(1+0.25+0) ‚Čą 1.1 ‚Üí ">"
[qrr_0227] dist(obj_4, obj_5) ‚Čą dist((-2,0.5,-2), (0.5,-0.5,3.5)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(6.25+1+30.25) ‚Čą 6.2 ‚Üí "<"
[qrr_0228] dist(obj_4, obj_7) ‚Čą dist((-2,0.5,-2), (2.5,-0.5,1)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(20.25+1+9) ‚Čą 5.5 ‚Üí "<"
[qrr_0229] dist(obj_4, obj_8) ‚Čą dist((-2,0.5,-2), (2,0.5,-2)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(16+0+0) ‚Čą 4 ‚Üí "~="
[qrr_0230] dist(obj_5, obj_7) ‚Čą dist((0.5,-0.5,3.5), (2.5,-0.5,1)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(4+0+6.25) ‚Čą 3.2 ‚Üí "~="
[qrr_0231] dist(obj_5, obj_8) ‚Čą dist((0.5,-0.5,3.5), (2,0.5,-2)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(2.25+1+30.25) ‚Čą 5.7 ‚Üí "<"
[qrr_0232] dist(obj_7, obj_8) ‚Čą dist((2.5,-0.5,1), (2,0.5,-2)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(0.25+1+9) ‚Čą 3.2 ‚Üí "~="

Now for obj_1-obj_7 distance: dist((-3,0,1), (2.5,-0.5,1)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(30.25+0.25+0) ‚Čą 5.5

[qrr_0233] dist(obj_2, obj_3) ‚Čą dist((1,-0.5,2), (3.5,0,1)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(6.25+0.25+1) ‚Čą 2.7 ‚Üí ">"
[qrr_0234] dist(obj_2, obj_4) ‚Čą dist((1,-0.5,2), (-2,0.5,-2)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(9+1+16) ‚Čą 5.1 ‚Üí "~="
[qrr_0235] dist(obj_2, obj_5) ‚Čą 1.6 ‚Üí ">"
[qrr_0236] dist(obj_2, obj_6) ‚Čą dist((1,-0.5,2), (0,0.5,-1)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(1+1+9) ‚Čą 3.3 ‚Üí ">"
[qrr_0237] dist(obj_2, obj_8) ‚Čą 4.2 ‚Üí ">"
[qrr_0238] dist(obj_3, obj_5) ‚Čą 3.9 ‚Üí ">"
[qrr_0239] dist(obj_3, obj_6) ‚Čą dist((3.5,0,1), (0,0.5,-1)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(12.25+0.25+4) ‚Čą 4.1 ‚Üí ">"
[qrr_0240] dist(obj_3, obj_8) ‚Čą dist((3.5,0,1), (2,0.5,-2)) ‚Čą ‚ąö(2.25+0.25+9) ‚Čą 3.4 ‚Üí ">"
